scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_055 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
The **noexec** mount option has been successfully added to the `/dev/shm` entry in `/etc/fstab`, and the filesystem has been remounted. Verification shows that `/dev/shm` is now mounted with `noexec`:

```
tmpfs on /dev/shm type tmpfs (rw,nodev,noexec,inode64)
```

This fulfills the OpenSCAP rule **mount_option_dev_shm_noexec**. No further remediation is required.
